## hi

```{r}

dat = read.csv("C:\\Users\\ALEX\\Desktop\\test1\\Herbicide\\data\\combined_dataframe.txt", header=TRUE, na.strings=c("#N/A", "-"))

farmer = "Farmer I (c/o Andrew Speirs)"

list_Herbicides = c("Clethodim", "Glyphosate", "Sulfometuron", "Terbuthylazine")

  df_farmer = dat[dat$Farmer_Agronomist==farmer, c(1:12, grep("Glyphosate", colnames(dat)))]
  df_farmer2 = df_farmer[!is.na(df_farmer[, grepl("_SURVI", colnames(df_farmer))]), ]
  df_farmer3 = df_farmer2[order(df_farmer2[, grepl("_SURVI", colnames(df_farmer2))], decreasing=FALSE), ]
  df_farmer4 = df_farmer[order(df_farmer$Glyphosate_SURVI, decreasing=FALSE, na.last=TRUE), ] # same with 3
  
  y = rev(seq(from=1, to=10, length=1))[1:nrow(dat)]
  
plot.new()
lines(x=c(1,1),y=c(2,2))
```


chunk cannot be broken
